description_long: This object consists of two stacked muffins with a rustic, homemade appearance. The muffins have a golden-brown top with subtle marbling and a slightly uneven, textured surface, suggesting a moist and tender crumb inside. The sides are encased in a light-colored, ridged wrapper that appears to be made of paper, with a rough, slightly torn edge in places. The tops are free of any visible toppings, frosting, or decorative elements, giving them a simple, classic look. The muffins are shown isolated against a plain background, with no visible plate or support beneath them. The overall impression is of freshly baked, unadorned muffins ready to be enjoyed.
description: Two plain, golden-brown muffins with ridged, light wrappers and rustic, marbled tops, stacked together with no visible toppings or decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing both muffins stacked, highlighting the marbled golden tops and the ridged, light wrappers.
description_view_1: Angled view focusing on the upper muffin's top and the rough, slightly torn edge of the wrapper.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the textured sides and the stacked arrangement, with the lower muffin partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the upper muffin and the full top of the lower muffin, with clear wrapper ridges.
